title: Why Bitcoin, Not Crypto: The Distinction That Changes Everything
description: Most people lump Bitcoin in with 'crypto.' That's a mistake. Here's why Bitcoin is fundamentally different — and why the distinction matters for your money, your brand, and your future.

title: How to Market a Bitcoin Company: What Works and What Doesn't
description: Bitcoin marketing is not like marketing anything else. The audience is different, the values are different, and the tactics that work in mainstream marketing often backfire. Here's what I've learned building brands in the Bitcoin space.
